name: DTM Daily Rollover
schedule: 00:01 daily in the user's local timezone
prompt: Read AGENTS.md and DTM.md, run python3 tools/dtm.py rollover, finalise the previous note from recorded evidence, populate today's Previous Day and Focus, preserve valid carried tasks and questions, instantiate recurrence, link active projects, record DTM activity, log only significant durable changes, and run DTM and wiki lint checks.
